session_d_pointers.description: yad - hand (general). 742 occ. Verse sample of 375 represents approximately 51% of occurrences. Authority and instrumental uses co-present; analysis cannot assume all occurrences are authority-register.
yad - hand: power. 585 occ. Verse sample of 278 represents approximately 48% of occurrences. Core authority idiom but sample is partial.

archōn - ruler/prince. 617 occ. Verse sample of 36 represents approximately 6% of occurrences. HIGH_FREQUENCY_ANCHOR: sample is highly partial. Full analysis requires Phase 2 independent research on unsampled occurrences.
dunamis - power. 579 occ. HIGH_FREQUENCY_ANCHOR. Verse sample of 107 represents approximately 18% of occurrences. Power-as-authority dimension requires full corpus coverage for synthesis conclusions.
archomai - to rule/begin. 55 occ. ZERO verses in export. No verse data available for analysis. Phase 2 research required before synthesis conclusions can be drawn on this term.
dunamai - to be able. 444 occ. Verse sample of 120 represents approximately 27% of occurrences. Capacity-authority dimension is present but sample partial.
H3027G (yad) has 742 occurrences. Export is volume-limited. Verse coverage is partial. Phase 2 must conduct additional independent research on this term before synthesis-level conclusions are drawn.
H3027H (yad) has 585 occurrences. Export is volume-limited. Verse coverage is partial. Phase 2 must conduct additional independent research on this term before synthesis-level conclusions are drawn.
